creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

You can find some of the clearest waters right here in the state of Florida and the beaches at Fort Desoto Park are the clearest in the Tampa area in my opinion! 

#floridabeaches #floridahiddengems #uniqueflorida #bluewaterflorida #tampaflorida

transcription.text: Let's go to paradise This time feel like Friday nights This time make you feel alive Feel like we in paradise Paradise Paradise
